description: [ELON] Fix RBAC permission checking to properly read user roles from Clerk metadata and validate against required permissions. Ensure requirePermission middleware correctly handles role hierarchy (Owner > Admin > Employee) and doesn't block legitimate access.
successCriteria: RBAC middleware correctly reads user role from Clerk publicMetadata
Permission checks properly validate against PERMISSIONS constant
Role hierarchy is respected (owners have all permissions)
403 errors include specific permission that was missing
